Support

Setup notes and troubleshooting for the palmshed SDK. If something is missing, open an issue.

Requirements

  • Python 3.10 or later
  • A Gemini API key from Google AI Studio

Install

pip install palmshed-sdk

Optional: pip install palmshed-sdk[redis] for Redis caching, palmshed-sdk[vertex] for Vertex AI image generation.

Environment variables

GEMINI_API_KEY       Required. Your Gemini API key.
REDIS_URL            Optional. Redis URL for caching.
IMAGE_PROVIDER       Optional. gemini, vertex, or mock.
IMAGE_MODEL          Optional. Image model name.
GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT Optional. GCP project for Vertex AI.
GOOGLE_CLOUD_LOCATION Optional. GCP location for Vertex AI.

Common issues

Symptom Cause Resolution
ValueError: GEMINI_API_KEY is required No API key passed or in environment Set GEMINI_API_KEY or pass api_key= to constructor.
Empty responses from generate_text Gemini returned empty text SDK returns synthetic fallback. Check your API quota.
Redis connection error Redis not running or wrong URL SDK falls back to in-memory cache. No action needed.
Image generation fails Model does not support image output Use gemini-2.5-flash-image or set IMAGE_PROVIDER=mock for testing.

Found something unexpected? Report an issue.
